---
title: "TRSE units: SNES"
description: Bundled Turbo Rascal unit files (.tru) shipped with TRSE
---

# SNES

These paths are relative to `units/SNES/` in the TRSE tree. Reference a unit with `@use "<path>"` (no `.tru` extension).

## Files

- `input`
- `levels`
- `memory`
- `music`
- `screen`
